audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at L327 (`if (s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0) revert LiveAuction()`) is applied to every element of `eligibleAssets` unconditionally before the only write to `s_auctionStarts[asset]` (L353). No alternative path sets `s_auctionStarts` to a non-zero value — grep confirms it is written only in `performUpkeep`. Even crafted calldata with duplicate assets or a reentrant call cannot produce a second live auction: the first case reverts the entire transaction after the first duplicate is encountered; the second case causes the outer call's guard to fire and revert.
